title: ochlandra elegantissima
intro: Ochlandra elegantissima, also known as Indian staff or staff tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ochlandra elegantissima include reducing fever and treating various infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of powder or decoction, and is also used to make a tincture or infusion for medicinal purposes.
